creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Needed to have libmatheval work everywhere in order to work on PR ports/155482 so here it is.

Fix: Attached patch updates devel/libmatheval to 1.1.7 (latest version) and helps it build on 64bit platforms by adding dependency on flex from ports (since we don't ship a libfl_pic.a in base). Build tested on 7-STABLE, 8-STABLE and 9-CURRENT both i386 and amd64 each. PR ports/155482 depends on this.

Patch attached with submission follows:
